titleStmt.title: SII 22.352: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 352. (A.R. No. 352 of 1906) TIRUCHIRAPALLI DISTRICT, PUDUKKOTTAI STATE, KUḌUMIYĀMALAI. ŚIKHĀNĀTHASVĀMI TEMPLE—ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE AKHILĀṆḌĒŚVARĪ SHRINE. TRIBH. VĪRA-PĀṆḌYADĒVA—13th YEAR.

summary.p: This is damaged. The details of the date are given as Mēsha, śu. Sunday, Hastā probably corresponding to A.D. 1266, April 18. The tithī should be śu. 13. The epigraph states that as the temple at Tirunalakkuṉṟam (Kuḍumiyāmalai) in Kō-nāḍu had gone out of repairs and there was no money for its renovation, the Nāṭṭar of Kāna-nāḍu and those connected with the temple administration sold a land called the Iluppaikkuḍi-vayal at Ammaṅgainallūr, which was a tirunāmattukkāṇi of the temple, to a certain dēvaraḍiyāḷ of the temple by name Nāchchiyār daughter of Durggaiyāṇḍāḷ for 73300 kāśu. Kānanāḍu is said to be situated in Kuṉṟuśūḻ-nāḍu a division of Kō-nāḍu also called Kaḍalāḍaiyādilaṅgaikoṇḍaśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī virapāṇṭiyatevaṟkku yāṇṭu 10 3vatu meṣa nāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu yum nāyaṟṟukkiḻamai Atta
ttunāḷ koṉāṭāṉa kaṭalaṭaiyātilaṅkaikoṇṭa coḻavaḷanāṭṭuk kuṉṟucūḻnāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tirunalakkuṉṟamuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil Āti
caṇṭeśvaratevar Aruḷāl Iṉnāṭṭu kāṉanāṭṭomum Ikkoyil śrī māheśvarakkaṇkāṇi ce tevarkaṉmi koyiṟkaṇakkar kaikkoḷa
romum Ikkoyil tevaraṭiyāril tukkaiyāṇṭāḷ makaḷ nācciyāṟku nāṅkaḷ nilavilaippiṟa ṇṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu Innāyanār tiru
kkaṟṟaḷi jirṇikkaiyil jirṇoddhāram paṇṇa Uṭalillāmaiyāl Itukku Uṭalāna patāṉa Innāyaṉār tirunāmattukkā
ṇi Iluppaikkuṭi kuḷamum vayaliṉāl paḷḷanilattukkup peru nāṉkellaiyāvatu kiḻpāṟkellai Atiyamaṅkalattuk kuḷattu nir
kovaikku rāvatu kuṟiccikkuḷattu nirkovaikku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai Oṭaiyum Uḷḷiṭṭa Oḻukkum tiruvekampamuṭaiyāṉ
vayakkalukkum teṉvayakkalukkum vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai muvaraiya vayakkalukkum ciṟuvala kkum marutaṅkuṭi vayalukkum kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Ūr
paṅkāṉa Ellaikkum Ammaṅkainallūr ṭaiyil putuvūr Ellaikku nāṭṭiṉa tiruccūlakkallukku cainta Ammaṅkainallūr
vayaluṅkuḷamum Uṭpaṭa nilamuṅkuḷamum teṉpāṟkellaiyil koyil kuḷattu ciṟu kumiḻiya kiḻakkum ṉila muṉṟutaṭiyum
Āka Ippaṭiyāl vanta nilattiluṅ kuḷattilumāka Ikkoyiṟ tevaraṭiyāril tiruccentuṟai kumāraṭi ykaḷukku nāṅkaḷ caṇṭeśvarap peru
vilaiyāka viṟṟa nilam muṉṟu mā muntirikaiyum vaṭakkil kuḷattup piṟkaraiyil periya viḻukkāṭṭuppaṭikku nikki viḷainilamu
m kuḷamum viṟṟuk kuṭuttuk koḷvatāṉa Emmilicainta vilaipporuḷ Aṉṟāṭu naṟputukkācu 7 10000 3 1000 3 100 Ikkācu Eḻupattumuvāyirattu muṉṉūṟṟukkum Āva
ṇakkaḷariye kāṭṭeṟṟi Āticaṇṭeśvaratevar śrīhastatte Oṭukkuvittu koṇṭu viṟṟu vilaippiramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttom tukkaiyāṇṭāḷ ma
kaḷ nācciyāṟku konāṭṭu nāṭṭomum Ikkoyiṟ śrī paṇṭārak kaṇkāṇiceykiṉṟa tevar kaṉmi koyiṟkaṇakkar kaikkoḷaromu
Innilattukkut tiruvācalāṟ ponta kaṭamai kiḻiṟai Iṟukka lāl patiṉkalamāka vanta ne
llum māttāl patiṉaiñcāka vanta kācum Uṭaiyār tirunalakkuṉṟamuṭaiya nāyanārkke Iṟukkak kaṭavarākavum Innilam tirunāmattukkāṇi
viniyokam Āṭtevai Ūrpuravu Iṟukkak kaṭavatallārākavum Innilattukku Ituve vilaiyāvatākavum Ituve poruḷ māvaṟutip po
(ruḷ māvaṟutip po)ruṭ celavolai yāvutākavum Ituvallatu veṟu poruḷ māvaṟutipporuṭcelavolai kāṇavuṅ kāṭṭavuṅ kaṭavatallavākavum Ip
paṭi cammatittu Ikkācu Eḻupattu muvāyirattu muṉṉūṟṟukkum Innilamum nilattāl vanta kuḷamum melnokkiya maramum kiḻnokkiya kiṇaṟum vilaikkuṟa viṟṟup po
ruḷaṟakkoṇṭu viṟṟu vilaippiramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttom tukkai yāṇṭāḷ makaḷ nācciyāṟku koṉāṭu nāṭṭomum yikkoyiṟ śrī māheśvara kaṇkāṇi ceyvā
rkaḷ tevarkaṉmi koyiṟkaṇakkaṟ kaikkoḷarom Ikkācu Eḻupattu muvāyirattu muṉṉūṟum Inta Iluppaikkuṭi vayalil Innilamum nilattāl vanta kuḷamum mel
nokkiya maramum kinokkiya kiṇaṟum maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭaṉavum vilakal taṉmatāṉattukku Urittākavum payiṟ ttavuṅ kuḻippeṉila kuḻikkavum maṟṟum Eppeṟpa
tānāyamana vikrayaṅkaḷukkum Urittāvatākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu vilaikkuṟa viṟṟu poruḷaṟak koṇṭu viṟṟu vilaippiramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttom kānaṉāṭāṉa ka
ṭalaṭaiyātilaṅkaikoṇṭa coḻavaḷanāṭṭuk kuṉṟucūḻnāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tirunalakkuṉṟamuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyiṟ tevaraṭiyār tukkaiyāṇṭāḷ makaḷ nācciyāṟku
Innāṭṭu nāṭṭomum Ikkoyiṟ śrī māheśvarak kaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷ tevarkaṉmi koyiṟkaṇakkuk kaikkoḷaromum Ippaṭikku Aṇṇal vāyal vaḷavataraiyaṉ Eḻut
tu Ippaṭikku Ivai teṉṉavataraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai vayalakattu cempiya taraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai taraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Eñcikun(ṭi)nallūr cemappaṉ pallavataraiya
ṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Aṇṇalvāyiṟ kurukulattaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai vaḷavaṉ pallavataraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku kuṉṟaṅkuṭi pattaṟkaruḷ ceyvāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai vaṭukaṉ centaṉ E
ḻuttu Ivai Ollaiyūr maṅkalattu Irācarāca Ollaiyūr nāṭṭu veḷāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku tirunalakkuṉṟattu Aṉpāṇṭāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai tirumuṉaippāṭi nampi Eḻuttu
Ivai Aṟputakkūttapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Aṭukkun tiyākipaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai kulottuṅkappallavataraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai tirunalakkuṉṟa mārāyaṉ Eḻuttu caijñā taṉmai
kkum Iṭṭu Ivai Ivvūr kaṇakku centaṉ vaṉapperumāḷ Eḻuttu Ivai kiḻttaṉayattu viracoḻa muventa veḷāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai vaḷavaṉ pallava taraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai
veḷāṉ periyatevan Eḻuttu Ivai Irācentiracoḻa veḷān Eḻuttu Ivai viḻiñattaraiyar caijñātanmaikku Ivai perumāḷppiḷ
ḷai Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku nampiyārūraṉāṉa kaṅkaikoṇṭa mārāyaṉ cajñā taṉmaiyum Iṭṭu Ivai koṉāṭṭuvayrāki Eḻuttu Ivai Ollaiyūr maṅkalattu pirāṇa nāyakaṉ Eḻuttu I
vai kūṟṟūr Ollaiyūr nāṭṭu veḷāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai kurukulattaraiyaṉ Aḻakiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ālattūr Uṟattūr nāṭṭuveḷāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku vaṭukaṉ piḷḷākuṭi Ālālacu
ntarapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikkucceṅkatirccoḻa muventa veḷāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Iṭaṅkoṇṭāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai nelveli mātaṉ nampi Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku kāraiyūr
periyāṇṭār Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku kāraiyūr coḻativākara muventa veḷāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ikkoyiṟ caivācāriyam tiruveṅkaṭammuṭaiyāṉ tirucciṟṟampalapaṇṭitaṉ Eḻuttu Itu Aṇṇa
vāyil Utaiyapperumāḷ Eḻuttu Itu puṉṉakkuṭic cempiyataraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai vaḷavataraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai ceyvāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Irācarāca purattu vallanāṭṭu veḷāṉ
Eḻuttu Ikkoyiṟ caivācāriyam nālāyirapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 22.352 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
